body.title: [dependency] Remove env/creds debris: .pre-uu-rename.bak, stray .env, kate-swp; reconcile uu.env
body.intention: I intend that ~/.unseen_university carries no stray env/creds debris — no orphaned backup, no editor swap file, no env file that shouldn't exist — so the config surface is exactly the intended set and nothing stale can be mis-sourced.
body.description:
Debris found on disk (Sonnet left a mess). Remove after EXACT-ID PREFLIGHT ([[feedback_exact_id_preflight_before_destructive]] — verify each is truly orphaned before rm): (1) ~/.unseen_university/uu_bash_profile.sh.pre-uu-rename.bak (Jun-24 backup, superseded by uu_bash_profile.sh); (2) ~/.unseen_university/.env (Akien: 'shouldn't exist' — remove ONLY after its GOOGLE_AI_STUDIO_API_KEY is relocated by T-consolidate-local-secrets-one-home, hence the gate); (3) ~/.unseen_university/akien/.notes_as_i_go_along.txt.kate-swp (editor swap file). (4) RECONCILE ~/.unseen_university/uu.env (UU_ROOT/UU_HOME_DB_URL/IGOR_*/CC_* — determine whether it is generated live by uu_bash_profile_processor.sh or is stale debris; if generated, leave it and document; if stale, remove). Discovery step: read bin/uu_bash_profile_processor.sh to see if it writes uu.env.

**Affected files:** none in-repo — deletes runtime files under ~/.unseen_university/ (personal runtime dir).
**Design rules:** exact-id-preflight-before-destructive; check-new-paths-unseen-university (propose+confirm before touching ~/.unseen_university).
**Scope boundary:** IN — remove the confirmed-orphaned .bak/.env/.swp; reconcile uu.env (keep-or-remove with reason). OUT — relocating secrets (T-consolidate-local-secrets-one-home); the .bashrc edits (T-bashrc-uu-migration-finish).
**Test plan:** no tests (runtime-file removal). Acceptance: `ls ~/.unseen_university/*.bak ~/.unseen_university/.env ~/.unseen_university/akien/*.kate-swp 2>/dev/null` returns nothing; uu.env either documented-as-live or removed with a recorded reason; a fresh shell + a device start still work (nothing depended on the removed files).
**Completion criteria:** the three debris files are gone (post-preflight); uu.env is resolved (kept+documented or removed+reasoned); env/device bring-up unaffected.
**Rollback:** scratchpad-snapshot each file before rm so it can be restored ([[feedback_git_checkout_clobbers_uncommitted]] — these are outside git).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
